stories: Good morning Sean, it's Saturday, the ninth of May 2026
Fun fact to start: May is the only month in which no sitting US President has ever died
Every other month has claimed at least one
So if you're running for the White House, May is your safest bet
Your calendar is clear today — enjoy the weekend
In Singapore, authorities are testing two residents for hantavirus after they were aboard the MV Hondius, a cruise ship linked to a deadly outbreak from Argentina
Both men are largely asymptomatic; risk to the public is assessed as low
Singapore Airlines also celebrated fifty years of uninterrupted Paris-Singapore service this week — a quiet milestone
Good morning Sean, it's Friday, the eighth of May, 2026
Fun fact: on this day in 1945, Germany signed the unconditional surrender ending World War II in Europe â still observed as Liberation Day there today, which is relevant to this morning's news
Looking at your Friday â morning run from seven until half-eight, Triage Time eight to eight-thirty
Lunch blocked from noon, then L4 Open Time from one to twenty past three, and Weekly Close-out at half three to wrap the week
In Singapore, PM Lawrence Wong is in Cebu for the final day of the 48th ASEAN Summit, with regional leaders focused on the Iran crisis ripple effects and South China Sea tensions
Back home, a new survey shows 88 percent of Singaporeans expect higher inflation this year, despite actual CPI holding at just 1
COE premiums also edged up in May's first bidding round
The dominant story globally is still the US-Israel war on Iran
Good evening Sean, it's Thursday evening, the seventh of May, 2026
Evolution found the formula once, and kept using it
Looking ahead to Friday Ã¢ÂÂ you've got your Morning Run at seven, Triage Time at eight, then your PMO Connect on Teams at quarter to ten
The L4 EAS PPS follows from ten until eleven
Lunch is blocked from noon, then at one o'clock it's your bi-monthly catch-up with Ajit on Teams
L4 Open Time runs through the mid-afternoon, and the Weekly Close-out lands at three-thirty
Good day to tie off loose ends before the weekend
